import pandas as pd
import pytz
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Constants
DATE_FORMAT = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"
TIMEZONES = [
    "America/New_York",
    "Europe/London",
    "Asia/Shanghai",
    "Asia/Tokyo",
    "Australia/Sydney",
]

def task_func(timestamp):
    # Convert timestamp to datetime object (UTC)
    utc_dt = datetime.fromtimestamp(timestamp)

    # Create an empty DataFrame
    df = pd.DataFrame(columns=['Timezone', 'Datetime'])

    # Add time zones and corresponding dates
    for zone in TIMEZONES:
        dt_zone = utc_dt.astimezone(pytz.timezone(zone))
        df = df.append({'Timezone': zone, 'Datetime': dt_zone.strftime(DATE_FORMAT)}, ignore_index=True)

    # Set index and sort by timezone
    df.set_index('Timezone', inplace=True)
    df.sort_index(inplace=True)

    # Plotting the data
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    df['Datetime'].plot.bar(ax=ax)

    # Set labels and title for the bar chart
    ax.set_xlabel('Timezone')
    ax.set_ylabel('Datetime')
    ax.set_title("Datetime = f(Timezone)")

    return df, ax
